headline: Is Schlumberger (SLB) Offering Value After ChampionX Deal And Solid Five Year Returns
summary: If you are wondering whether SLB is reasonably priced at its current level, you are not alone; many investors are asking if the market is giving them a fair deal on this stock right now. Over the short term, SLB's share price has been relatively steady, with a 0.1% return over 7 days and 6.0% over 30 days, while longer term returns of 27.5% year to date, 32.7% over 1 year, flat over 3 years and 92.3% over 5 years give you more context for where it sits today. Recent moves in SLB have been...

headline: Jim Cramer on Transocean: “It’s Not My Favorite”
summary: Transocean Ltd. (NYSE:RIG) is one of the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar. A caller sought Cramer’s opinion on the stock, and he replied: Alright… If it were a $60 stock instead of 6, no one would touch it. The fact is that it can go higher, but I do know it’s got a lot of […]

headline: Halliburton's Asset Sale Halt Paves Way for Venezuela Restart
summary: HAL's $6.6M asset auction halt by Venezuela after U.S. intervention signals a potential restart of American oil operations in the country.

headline: Is It Worth Investing in SLB (SLB) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in SLB (SLB). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?
